readme_required_items: How to reproduce the required scenario results.
The answers to the operational decision questions.
Any suggested improvements or further scenarios.
decision_questions: What is the expected ore throughput to the crusher during the baseline 8-hour shift?
What are the likely bottlenecks in the haulage system?
Does adding more trucks materially improve throughput, or does the system saturate?
Would improving the narrow ramp materially improve throughput?
How sensitive is throughput to crusher service time?
What is the operational impact of losing the main ramp route?

evaluation_dimensions.name: Conceptual modelling
criteria: sensible entity, resource, event, and state definitions

evaluation_dimensions.name: Data and topology handling
criteria: calculates routes and travel times from the graph

evaluation_dimensions.name: Simulation correctness
criteria: models loading, hauling, dumping, and return travel
represents queues and constrained resources correctly
records throughput based on completed dump events

evaluation_dimensions.name: Results and interpretation
criteria: avoids overclaiming beyond the model assumptions

evaluation_dimensions.name: Code quality
criteria: reasonable separation of model, experiment, analysis, and reporting

evaluation_dimensions.name: Traceability and auditability
criteria: allows inspection of truck movements and state transitions
supports validation of queueing and resource behaviour

evaluation_dimensions.name: Efficiency
criteria: reasonable token and tool usage, where measurable
